name: Deform It
description: Deform It is a game about deforming objects. There are 13 different ball options and 14 levels in total. Set in space, this game has 3 game modes. -Level Mode -Free Deform Mode -Antigravity Mode
instructions: ---GAMEPLAY--- Move the camera with WASD Move the camera UP Q Move the camera DOWN E LMB for shooting projectiles C for open close crosshair V for lock unlock cursor P for open close PAUSE Panel ---SKILLS--- F Doubleshot Skill G Triples
